'''jashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:uselessly|uselessly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uselessly|uselessly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jashate|jashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jashatesher|jashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jashatesherĂ«m|jashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jashatero|jashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jashateshĂ«|jashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jashateshĂ«m|jashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijashatero|gokijashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijashateshĂ«|gokijashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijashateshĂ«m|gokijashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojashankerom|gojashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojashankeshĂ«|gojashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojashankeshĂ«m|gojashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojashankeya|gojashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jashaterom|jashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jashatemu|jashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jashateya|jashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijashaterom|gokijashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijashatemu|gokijashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijashateya|gokijashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jashashate|jashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jashashatesher|jashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jashashatesherĂ«m|jashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jashashatero|jashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jashashateshĂ«|jashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jashashateshĂ«m|jashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijashashatero|gokijashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijashashateshĂ«|gokijashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijashashateshĂ«m|gokijashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojashashankerom|gojashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojashashankeshĂ«|gojashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojashashankeshĂ«m|gojashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojashashankeya|gojashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jashashaterom|jashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jashashatemu|jashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jashashateya|jashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijashashaterom|gokijashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijashashatemu|gokijashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijashashateya|gokijashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠshĂŠte|jĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠshĂŠtesher|jĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠshĂŠtero|jĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠshĂŠtero|gokijĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠshĂŠterom|jĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠshĂŠtemu|jĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠshĂŠteya|jĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠshĂŠterom|gokijĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠshĂŠteya|gokijĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafshafte|jafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafshaftesher|jafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafshaftesherĂ«m|jafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafshaftero|jafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafshafteshĂ«|jafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafshafteshĂ«m|jafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafshaftero|gokijafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafshafteshĂ«|gokijafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafshafteshĂ«m|gokijafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafshafnkerom|gojafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafshafnkeshĂ«|gojafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafshafnkeshĂ«m|gojafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafshafnkeya|gojafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafshafterom|jafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafshaftemu|jafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafshafteya|jafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafshafterom|gokijafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafshaftemu|gokijafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafshafteya|gokijafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
